# LabShelf

> A one-time-purchase lab inventory tracker that runs inside the buyer's own Google account as an Apps Script web app backed by a Google Sheet. $49, no subscription, data stays in the buyer's Drive.

## What it is
LabShelf is distributed as three plain-text files — an Apps Script backend (`Code.txt`), an HTML frontend (`Index.txt`), and a step-by-step `README.txt` — inside a zip emailed after checkout. The buyer deploys their own instance on Google's free Apps Script tier.

## Who it's for
Small academic and industry labs (typically 2–20 people) that currently track reagents and consumables in a shared Google Sheet and want a real app interface without a per-seat SaaS bill.

## What it does
- Inventory with low-stock alerts
- Order request workflow (open / ordered / received)
- Team feed (equipment / safety / reminder posts)
- Invite-only email + password login; lab members do not need Google accounts
- Installable to phone home screen

## What it is NOT
No barcode scanning. No freezer maps. No expiration auto-alerts. No GxP / 21 CFR Part 11 audit trail.

## Pricing
$49 one-time, unlimited users per lab, no refunds (source code is delivered).

## Key pages
